subtopics: Need for measurement; Units of measurement; Systems of units
key_concepts: SI units, fundamental and derived units

subtopics: Frame of reference; Motion in a straight line
key_concepts: Elementary concepts of differentiation and integration for describing motion
Average speed, average velocity, instantaneous velocity
Velocity-time and position-time graphs; Relations for uniformly accelerated motion (graphical and calculus treatment)

subtopics: Scalar and vector quantities; Position and displacement vectors
key_concepts: General vectors, equality of vectors, multiplication by real number
Addition and subtraction of vectors, Unit vector
Resolution of a vector in plane, rectangular components
Scalar and Vector product of vectors
Motion in a plane: Uniform velocity/acceleration, Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion
Momentum and Newton's second law, Impulse
Law of conservation of linear momentum and its applications
Equilibrium of concurrent forces; Static/kinetic friction, Rolling friction

subtopics: Work done by constant/variable force; Kinetic energy
key_concepts: Potential energy (including spring), Conservative and non-conservative forces

chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_heading: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Centre of mass (two-particle system, rigid body, uniform rod)
key_concepts: Momentum conservation and Centre of mass motion
Law of conservation of angular momentum
Equilibrium of rigid bodies; Rigid body rotation equations
Comparison of linear/rotational motions, Moment of inertia
Acceleration due to gravity (variation with altitude/depth)
Gravitational potential energy and gravitational potential
Escape speed, Orbital velocity of a satellite
Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus
Shear modulus of rigidity (qualitative), Poisson's ratio

subtopics: Pressure due to fluid column; Pascal's law
key_concepts: Streamline and turbulent flow, Critical velocity
Excess pressure across curved surface; Drops, bubbles, capillary rise

subtopics: Heat, temperature; Thermal expansion (solids, liquids, gases)
key_concepts: Heat transfer: Conduction, convection, radiation; Thermal conductivity
Blackbody radiation concepts: Wein's displacement Law, Stefan's law

subtopics: Thermal equilibrium; Zeroth law of thermodynamics
key_concepts: Second law of thermodynamics: State variables, equation of state
Change of gaseous state conditions (isothermal, adiabatic)

units.unit_name: Behaviour of Perfect Gases and Kinetic Theory of Gases

subtopics: Equation of state of a perfect gas; Work done in compressing gas
key_concepts: Kinetic theory assumptions, concept of pressure
Kinetic interpretation of temperature; RMS speed
Degrees of freedom, Law of equipartition of energy (statement)
Application to specific heat capacities of gases
Displacement as a function of time; Periodic functions
Uniform circular motion and its equations
Content not explicitly detailed in provided text excerpt
Force between multiple charges and superposition principle
Electric field due to point charge and dipole
Torque on a dipole in uniform electric field
Conductors, insulators, free and bound charges

units.unit_name: Unit-III Magnetic Effects of Current and Magnetism

key_concepts: Force on moving charge and current-carrying conductor

units.unit_name: Unit-IV Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents

key_concepts: Lenz's law and conservation of energy
Peak and RMS values of AC
Phasor diagrams for R, L, C circuits
Production of EM waves by accelerating charges
Total internal reflection and optical fibers
Interference of light and Young's double slit experiment
Diffraction due to a single slit
